mapper.select: SELECT E.EMPNO, E.ENAME, E.JOB, E1.ENAME AS mgr, S.GRADE AS salGrade, D.DNAME FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN EMP E1 ON E.MGR = E1.EMPNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP(EMPNO, ENAME, JOB) VALUES(#{empNo}, #{eName}, #{job})
mapper.select: SELECT E.EMPNO, E.ENAME, E.JOB, E1.ENAME AS mgr, S.GRADE AS salGrade, D.DNAME FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN EMP E1 ON E.MGR = E1.EMPNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE E.EMPNO = #{empNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN EMP E1 ON E.MGR = E1.EMPNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO
